title: CodeGrind: AI-assisted DSA Practice with Real-time Editor and Azure OpenAI
summary: Showcase CodeGrind's AI-assisted problem solving, real-time editor, and fresh Google authentication integration in a concise post highlighting the latest workflow and learning features.
core_message: CodeGrind combines LeetCode-style challenges with an Azure OpenAI assistant, real-time code execution, and streamlined sign-in to deliver an engaging, hands-on DSA practice experience.
cta: Try CodeGrind now and level up your practice with AI guidance and instant feedback.
visual_brief: A short demo-style video showing the CodeGrind interface: problem description on one side, live code editor with syntax highlighting, AI assistant chat panel, and a quick sign-in flow. Include subtle cyberpunk touches and UI glow to reflect the Code Breach theme. End with a call-to-action screen: 'Practice DSA with AI help at codegrind.online'.
